title: LyondellBasell (LYB) Makes Car Parts From Auto Plastic Waste
text: LyondellBasell (LYB) is collaborating with Audi to establish an innovative closed-loop process to recycle plastic automotive parts for use in new vehicles.

title: LyondellBasell (LYB) to Build New Plant in Germany, Shares Up
text: LyondellBasell (LYB) announced that it will build a new recycling plant in Germany, following which its share price increased.

title: LyondellBasell Stock: 3 Reasons To Remain Bullish Despite Headwinds
text: LyondellBasell is a chemical company that also refines crude oil into gasoline and distillates. The business is facing severe headwinds right now.

title: LyondellBasell Industries: Still Offering Desirable Value Even With Europe Suffering
text: LyondellBasell Industries saw a very strong start to 2022 and paid their first-ever special dividend. Although, the third quarter saw their financial performance softening as they face demand weakness in North America and cost issues in Europe.

title: These Were The Five Best And Worst Performing Basic Materials Stocks In October 2022
text: Basic materials, such as metal, concrete and chemicals, form the backbone of the global economy because every sector requires basic materials.
